agent: Wave N6 — Demo B broadcast (Real-Time FX Swap Pool Using Gateway)

outcome.evidence: One Arc Testnet tx (0x66dc22ae835884c9b50641d062a53f8a80e3191a89a9a6337e81c95f2cf9bc09, status=success, gasUsed=21,349,297, block=43521137) where TelaranaGatewayHubHook.beforeSwap pulled 0.1 USDC inline from Circle Gateway and settled it to PoolManager. The single tx emits GatewayHubMintAttested (0x920529b0…), GatewayHubLiquidityReceived (0x9893f54e…), and GatewayRoutedSwap (0x0f0ffd9e…) — confirming the entire intra-hook Gateway USDC liquidity path executed. No CCTP attestation polling. No off-chain settlement loop. The keeper net USDC balance delta is gas-dominated (USDC is the gas token on Arc; the 0.1 USDC swap output is masked by ~0.32 USDC gas cost), but the USDC.Transfer logs prove 100000 USDC moved 0x0→TGH→PoolManager→keeper inside one tx.

differentiatorNote: This proves the Hookathon submission's new clause: 'Real-Time FX Swap Pools Using Gateway, rather than relying only on CCTP with shared Hub liquidity across chains.' Demo A (CCTP) requires a multi-block burn → Iris poll → mint cycle; Demo B (Gateway) materialises the USDC inside beforeSwap atomically in one tx.

deltas._note: keeper USDC delta is dominated by gas (USDC is native on Arc, gas = 21.3M * 20 Gwei ≈ 0.43 USDC). Inside the tx the keeper received +0.1 USDC via Gateway intra-hook mint (USDC.Transfer logs confirm: 0x0→TGH 100000, TGH→PM 100000, PM→keeper 100000). EURC was pre-settled then refunded since the new pool has no LP yet — 10000 EURC went keeper→PM→keeper net 0.

steps.detail: TGH PR-H8 surface live (getHookPermissions=beforeSwap|beforeSwapReturnDelta); gatewayRoute(routeId) enabled (sourceDomain=1 Fuji, destDomain=26 Arc); gatewayContextProofMode=3 (SIGNED_INTENT_OR_HYPERLANE); keeper holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE+EXECUTOR_ROLE.

PoolManager.initialize(PoolKey(USDC/EURC/fee=100/spacing=1/hooks=TGH), sqrtPriceX96=0xf52559aa0006380000000000) — NEW pool with TGH as the v4 hooks address (low-14 bits 0x088 = beforeSwap|beforeSwapReturnDelta).
TGH.setPoolGatewayRoute(poolId=0xf6b13fe5…7f711, routeId=0xf78147c9…2a968) — binds the new pool to the Fuji→Arc USDC Gateway route configured in Wave M4.

POST https://gateway-api-testnet.circle.com/v1/transfer signed by keeper EIP-712 (GatewayWallet domain). Mint authorised 0.1 USDC Fuji→Arc with destinationRecipient=destinationCaller=TGH so beforeSwap can invoke gatewayMint atomically. Server-issued transferId=7429e2e4-9ad3-49de-a0f6-ed7b3e27b2c7.
EURC.approve(harness, 1_000_000) — pre-funds harness to settle EURC input; the input is refunded since the new pool has no LP yet.

harness.swapExactInputSingleWithHookData(poolKey, zeroForOne=false, amountIn=10000 EURC, amountOutMinimum=0, recipient=keeper, hookData=encode(attestation,signature,GatewayMintContext)). Inside one tx: TGH.beforeSwap → GatewayMinter.gatewayMint (Circle attestation verified onchain via ecrecover) → USDC.mint(TGH, 100000) → TGH.USDC.transfer(PoolManager, 100000) → PoolManager.settle → BeforeSwapDelta(0, -100000) → PoolManager.swap nets out → harness.take(USDC, keeper, 100000).

usdcFlowInSingleTx: USDC.mint     0x0000…0000 -> TGH         amount=100000 (Circle GatewayMinter inlined the cross-chain transfer)
USDC.transfer TGH         -> PoolManager amount=100000 (TGH settled the minted USDC to the v4 PM)
USDC.transfer PoolManager -> keeper      amount=100000 (harness.take delivered USDC to the recipient)
eurcFlowInSingleTx: EURC.transfer     PoolManager -> keeper      amount=10000 (harness drained residual input delta since new pool has no LP; user gets EURC back, retains the +0.1 USDC from Gateway)
remainingForFullProductionDemo: Seed the new pool with USDC/EURC liquidity (currently empty; the Gateway-routed-swap demo works without LP because BeforeSwapDelta supplies the entire output, but a real FX swap should consume the user's input via AMM swap math against LP).
Extend the FxV4RouterHarnessGateway tests (Foundry) to lock in the no-LP path + LP path side-by-side.
Pin FxV4RouterHarnessGateway in fx-telarana/deployments/arc-testnet.json + defi-web-app/packages/contracts/src/bento.ts so the web app can drive the same flow.
Author keeper-gateway-signer task that auto-mints fresh attestations against the BurnIntent skeleton + posts to Circle /v1/transfer on a cron so the demo works without manual mint.

After re-attempting, the same pool re-broadcast hits PriceLimitAlreadyExceeded — the no-LP swap moves the price to MAX_SQRT_PRICE. To re-broadcast against the same pool, either (a) seed LP first, or (b) init a sibling pool with a different fee tier to get a fresh sqrtPriceX96.
